description: Smoke fixture for the inner-loop streamText call site (post-D-3). Covers a minimal Next.js project with an instrumentation goal. Live golden capture requires WIZARD_OAUTH_TOKEN; the bundled golden.ndjson is a smoke-shape recording, not a full-fidelity inner-loop trace. Re-record once §7.5 wizard-side OAuth wiring lands.

input.instrumentationGoal: Instrument page_viewed, sign_up_completed, and checkout_completed in the marketing app under fixtures/working/.
